title.en: China-to-South Korea EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入韩国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入韓國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against South Korea KC electrical safety, connector, KEPCO grid, and Ministry of Environment/KECO EV charging requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与韩国 KC 电气安全、接口、KEPCO 电网以及环境部/KECO 充电要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與韓國 KC 電氣安全、接口、KEPCO 電網以及環境部/KECO 充電要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Korean agency assessment, electrical-installation design, customs determination, subsidy eligibility decision, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, and installers should verify current Korean KC rules, KATS standards, KEPCO interconnection requirements, and Ministry of Environment/KECO charging-infrastructure rules with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、韩国主管机关评审、电气安装设计、海关裁定、补贴资格决定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营商和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前，应与合格专业人士核验现行韩国 KC 规则、KATS 标准、KEPCO 并网要求以及环境部/KECO 充电基础设施规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、韓國主管機關評審、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、補貼資格決定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、運營商和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或運營前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行韓國 KC 規則、KATS 標準、KEPCO 併網要求以及環境部/KECO 充電基礎設施規則。

answer_first.en: KC electrical safety is compulsory where the EV charger is in scope; Korean deployments also require Korea-market connector compatibility (Type 1/CCS1, not GB/T 20234), KEPCO grid acceptance, and Ministry of Environment/KECO public-charging rules.
answer_first.zh: 适用范围内的电动汽车充电桩在韩国须强制满足 KC 电气安全；韩国部署还需要符合韩国市场接口兼容性（Type 1/CCS1，而非 GB/T 20234）、KEPCO 电网接入以及环境部/KECO 公共充电规则。
answer_first.zht: 適用範圍內的電動汽車充電樁在韓國須強制滿足 KC 電氣安全；韓國部署還需要符合韓國市場接口相容性（Type 1/CCS1，而非 GB/T 20234）、KEPCO 電網接入以及環境部/KECO 公共充電規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, environmental agency, certification body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
